existing_features.title: Restore the full frontend application to the Version 9 state, preserving all its layouts, sections, content, styling, and functionality exactly as they were in that version.

Replace the CETA Galaxy logo used in Version 9 with the CETA Galaxy logo asset from Version 16. Update all references to the CETA Galaxy logo in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx to use the Version 16 logo file.
